006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

010 *

012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.ThrowableUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023
024import javax.xml.namespace.*;
025import javax.xml.stream.*;
026import javax.xml.stream.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
029
030/**
031 * Wrapper class around a {@link XMLStreamReader}.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * The purpose is to encapsulate the reader with the {@link ParserPipe} object so that it can be retrieved for
035 * debugging purposes.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
038 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/XmlBasics">XML Basics</a>
039 * </ul>
040 */
041@SuppressWarnings({
042   "resource" // pipe field is owned by the caller's parser session; the Reader it supplies is consumed by XMLInputFactory and not owned here.
043})
044public class XmlReader implements XMLStreamReader, Positionable {
045
046   private final ParserPipe pipe;
047   private final XMLStreamReader sr;
048
049   /**
050    * Constructor.
051    *
052    * @param pipe The parser input.
053    * @param validating The value for the {@link XMLInputFactory#IS_VALIDATING} setting.
054    * @param reporter The value for the {@link XMLInputFactory#REPORTER} setting.
055    * @param resolver The value for the {@link XMLInputFactory#RESOLVER} setting.
056    * @param eventAllocator The value for the {@link XMLInputFactory#ALLOCATOR} setting.
057    * @throws IOException Thrown by underling
058    * @throws XMLStreamException Thrown by underlying XML stream.
059    */
060   protected XmlReader(ParserPipe pipe, boolean validating, XMLReporter reporter, XMLResolver resolver, XMLEventAllocator eventAllocator) throws IOException, XMLStreamException {
061      this.pipe = pipe;
062      try {
063         Reader r = pipe.getBufferedReader();
064         var factory = XMLInputFactory.newInstance();
065         factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_VALIDATING, validating);
066         factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_COALESCING, true);
067         factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_REPLACING_ENTITY_REFERENCES, false);
068         factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.IS_SUPPORTING_EXTERNAL_ENTITIES, false);
069         if (factory.isPropertySupported(XMLInputFactory.REPORTER) && nn(reporter))
070            factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.REPORTER, reporter);
071         if (factory.isPropertySupported(XMLInputFactory.RESOLVER) && nn(resolver))
072            factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.RESOLVER, resolver);
073         if (factory.isPropertySupported(XMLInputFactory.ALLOCATOR) && nn(eventAllocator))
074            factory.setProperty(XMLInputFactory.ALLOCATOR, eventAllocator);
075      sr = factory.createXMLStreamReader(r);
076      sr.nextTag();
077      pipe.setPositionable(this);
078   } catch (Exception e) {
079      throw castException(IOException.class, e);
080   }
081   }
082
083   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
084   public void close() throws XMLStreamException {
085      sr.close();
086   }
087
088   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
089   public int getAttributeCount() { return sr.getAttributeCount(); }
090
091   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
092   public String getAttributeLocalName(int index) {
093      return sr.getAttributeLocalName(index);
094   }
095
096   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
097   public QName getAttributeName(int index) {
098      return sr.getAttributeName(index);
099   }
100
101   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
102   public String getAttributeNamespace(int index) {
103      return sr.getAttributeNamespace(index);
104   }
105
106   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
107   public String getAttributePrefix(int index) {
108      return sr.getAttributePrefix(index);
109   }
110
111   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
112   public String getAttributeType(int index) {
113      return sr.getAttributeType(index);
114   }
115
116   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
117   public String getAttributeValue(int index) {
118      return sr.getAttributeValue(index);
119   }
120
121   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
122   public String getAttributeValue(String namespaceURI, String localName) {
123      return sr.getAttributeValue(namespaceURI, localName);
124   }
125
126   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
127   public String getCharacterEncodingScheme() { return sr.getCharacterEncodingScheme(); }
128
129   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
130   public String getElementText() throws XMLStreamException { return sr.getElementText(); }
131
132   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
133   public String getEncoding() { return sr.getEncoding(); }
134
135   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
136   public int getEventType() { return sr.getEventType(); }
137
138   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
139   public String getLocalName() { return sr.getLocalName(); }
140
141   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
142   public Location getLocation() { return sr.getLocation(); }
143
144   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
145   public QName getName() { return sr.getName(); }
146
147   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
148   public NamespaceContext getNamespaceContext() { return sr.getNamespaceContext(); }
149
150   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
151   public int getNamespaceCount() { return sr.getNamespaceCount(); }
152
153   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
154   public String getNamespacePrefix(int index) {
155      return sr.getNamespacePrefix(index);
156   }
157
158   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
159   public String getNamespaceURI() { return sr.getNamespaceURI(); }
160
161   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
162   public String getNamespaceURI(int index) {
163      return sr.getNamespaceURI(index);
164   }
165
166   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
167   public String getNamespaceURI(String prefix) {
168      return sr.getNamespaceURI(prefix);
169   }
170
171   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
172   public String getPIData() { return sr.getPIData(); }
173
174   /**
175    * Returns the pipe passed into the constructor.
176    *
177    * @return The pipe passed into the constructor.
178    */
179   public ParserPipe getPipe() { return pipe; }
180
181   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
182   public String getPITarget() { return sr.getPITarget(); }
183
184   @Override /* Overridden from Positionable */
185   public Position getPosition() {
186      var l = getLocation();
187      return new Position(l.getLineNumber(), l.getColumnNumber());
188   }
189
190   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
191   public String getPrefix() { return sr.getPrefix(); }
192
193   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
194   public Object getProperty(String name) throws IllegalArgumentException {
195      return sr.getProperty(name);
196   }
197
198   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
199   public String getText() { return sr.getText(); }
200
201   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
202   public char[] getTextCharacters() { return sr.getTextCharacters(); }
203
204   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
205   public int getTextCharacters(int sourceStart, char[] target, int targetStart, int length) throws XMLStreamException {
206      return sr.getTextCharacters(sourceStart, target, targetStart, length);
207   }
208
209   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
210   public int getTextLength() { return sr.getTextLength(); }
211
212   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
213   public int getTextStart() { return sr.getTextStart(); }
214
215   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
216   public String getVersion() { return sr.getVersion(); }
217
218   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
219   public boolean hasName() {
220      return sr.hasName();
221   }
222
223   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
224   public boolean hasNext() throws XMLStreamException {
225      return sr.hasNext();
226   }
227
228   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
229   public boolean hasText() {
230      return sr.hasText();
231   }
232
233   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
234   public boolean isAttributeSpecified(int index) {
235      return sr.isAttributeSpecified(index);
236   }
237
238   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
239   public boolean isCharacters() { return sr.isCharacters(); }
240
241   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
242   public boolean isEndElement() { return sr.isEndElement(); }
243
244   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
245   public boolean isStandalone() { return sr.isStandalone(); }
246
247   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
248   public boolean isStartElement() { return sr.isStartElement(); }
249
250   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
251   public boolean isWhiteSpace() { return sr.isWhiteSpace(); }
252
253   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
254   public int next() throws XMLStreamException {
255      return sr.next();
256   }
257
258   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
259   public int nextTag() throws XMLStreamException {
260      return sr.nextTag();
261   }
262
263   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
264   public void require(int type, String namespaceURI, String localName) throws XMLStreamException {
265      sr.require(type, namespaceURI, localName);
266   }
267
268   @Override /* Overridden from XMLStreamReader */
269   public boolean standaloneSet() {
270      return sr.standaloneSet();
271   }
272}
